sqlMap.select: select * from AttestationAuditWork where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ClientIndustryKey = #ClientIndustryKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AttestationAuditWork(ClientIndustryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey AuditClients ClientsAssetsOver NetLossForLastFYE ) values (#ClientIndustryKey:NUMERIC#, #VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #AuditClients# #ClientsAssetsOver# #NetLossForLastFYE# )
sqlMap.select: select AuditClients, ClientsAssetsOver, NetLossForLastFYE, ClientIndustryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttestationAuditWork where ClientIndustryKey = #ClientIndustryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AttestationAuditWork set
AuditClients = #AuditClients# AuditClients = null ClientsAssetsOver = #ClientsAssetsOver# ClientsAssetsOver = null NetLossForLastFYE = #NetLossForLastFYE# NetLossForLastFYE = null
where ClientIndustryKey = #ClientIndustryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AttestationAuditWork where ClientIndustryKey = #ClientIndustryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from AttestationAuditWork where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ClientIndustryKey = #ClientIndustryKey#
sqlMap.select: select AuditClients, ClientsAssetsOver, NetLossForLastFYE, ClientIndustryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttestationAuditWork where ClientIndustryKey = #ClientIndustryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ClientIndustryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AuditClients, ClientsAssetsOver, NetLossForLastFYE from AttestationAuditWork where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ClientIndustryKey = #ClientIndustryKey#
